gigapan.description:
This is  shot of the studio set up at the back of the Burning Man Earth booth at SF Decompression.

These images were taken with 16-40 images from a Canon T2i.  An
18 megapixel Digital SLR.  I used the 55mm lens - which has a 86.5
mm 35mm equivalent.

Other GigaPans from the event are (or are going to be) at
http://gigapan.org/gigapans/tag/decom2010/most_popular/

I also have photos on flickr from the event at:
http://www.flickr.com/search/?q=decom2010&w=41715395@N00
